content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.86% recovering above 24,200 with VIX -3.27%, but the tape is event-heavy (US Fed tonight, VEDL ex-date tomorrow, multiple Q4 prints) and the book is already 55% deployed with 9 names. Late-session (14:40) entries face overnight gap risk and US Fed binary. Priority is locking in gains on existing winners via SL trails, not chasing breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24335
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.7% unrealized; current SL 1048 already above entry (locked profit). Tighten slightly to 1040 below day's pivot/VWAP support — protects ~5.7% gain while letting price extend toward original 1110 target. Per +4% trail rule, current SL is already inside trail zone, only minor adjustment needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 2.5%, gold pulled back from ATH on Hormuz de-escalation hopes but US Fed tonight is a binary — dovish surprise re-ignites gold. SL at 119 (~2.5% below CMP) is appropriate defensive hedge. Hold through Fed event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1455.00,
      "new_target": 1495.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.9% in profit, current SL 1448 already above entry (breakeven+). Stock at fresh 52w high zone with HUL Q4 tomorrow as catalyst. Trail SL up to 1455 (just below VWAP 1456) to lock in ~3% gain. Tighten target to 1495 (just below psychological 1500) for realistic exit given premium valuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "new_target": 414.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock weakened from 410 high to 403 in last 90 min, breaking VWAP. SL at 401 is tight and appropriate — if breaks, thesis of momentum-led re-rating is invalidated near results (May 15). No SL change (already tight); tighten target slightly to 414 (just below 52w high) — more realistic near-term."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.5% with strong volume surge (5.3x) and breakout above VWAP 1757. Per +2% trail rule, raise SL to 1762 (above entry 1734, locks ~1.6% min gain) below today's VWAP support. Q4 results May 19 is binary — keep SL tight."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginally positive +0.5%, near 52w high but consolidating. Board meeting tomorrow (fundraise) + Q4 May 19 are catalysts. SL 318 (~1.2% below) is tight and appropriate; not enough P&L cushion yet to trail further."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.4% with current SL 480 already AT CMP 480.45 — effectively a tight trailing stop locking in ~2.3% gain. Stock made new 52w high today (485.70) on Q4 beat. Letting existing SL ride is appropriate — any meaningful pullback exits with profit, momentum continuation hits 495 target. No-op MODIFY would be wasted."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 75,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock down -2.4% today on heavy 3.2x volume, broke below entry 612 intraday (low 606), and ex-dividend tomorrow Apr 30 will mechanically reset price down by Rs 11/share — nearly wiping any remaining cushion. Current SL 615 is ABOVE CMP 613.55, will get triggered in any tightening. Bearish marubozu + bearish engulfing on Apr 23 daily are confirmed reversal signals. Exit at market to preserve near-breakeven rather than absorb dividend gap-down volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry today on Q4 beat; flat on the position. Stock at 52w high zone with strong fundamentals (PAT +68%, NIM 6.2% guidance to expand). SL 191 (~4.7% below) is appropriate for breakout entry. Let the thesis play out toward 218 target."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL slightly to 1040 (below day's range support). Locks in ~5.7% gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive Fed hedge; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1455.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to lock in ~3% gain ahead of HUL Q4 binary."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 401 already tight; let it ride to results catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail above entry to lock gain on volume breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight existing SL adequate; insufficient P&L cushion to trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Existing SL 480 already at CMP — effectively a tight trail; no-op modify would be wasted."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bearish reversal patterns + ex-dividend gap risk tomorrow + SL already above CMP. Exit now."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry, flat P&L; let thesis play out."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK, GRSE, COALINDIA, MARUTI all up sharply on Q4 prints — FOMO chasing into US Fed binary tonight is bad R/R. VEDL ex-date tomorrow with mechanical price reset — algo cannot handle corporate action cleanly, AVOID. BAJFINANCE results after-hours today, monitor tomorrow. ITC tax overhang too heavy despite today's bounce. TECHM/IT sector still in 30-month down-trend, single-day +4.5% not a trend reversal yet. Pending orders (GLENMARK 2400, PHARMABEES 23.65, TATAPOWER 443) — all far from fill, leaving open as low-probability dip catchers.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 55% deployed across 9 names with +1.20% session P&L; rolling 5-day stats are concerning (13% win rate, 0.4x profit factor, -INR 4,408 net). Per deployment hysteresis rule, default disposition is NO new entries. Today's discipline: (1) trail SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND, SUNPHARMA), (2) exit HINDZINC ahead of ex-div mechanical gap-down, (3) hold tight stops on marginal positions (NTPC, POWERGRID, COALINDIA), (4) no new BUYs into US Fed binary at 14:40 IST. Capital preservation > activity. Worst-case if all SLs hit: ~INR 8-10k loss, well within daily limit."
}
